{{Quote|Are you all right, Chiara? I had my hands full with ''fried crispics'' and couldn't come help.|Gorb Drig|<ref name="Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 4">[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 4|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 4]]</ref>}}
'''Fried crispics''', or '''crispics''' for short, were fried snack rolls commonly found in [[Cantina/Legends|cantinas]].

==Description==
Ingredients of fried crispic included meat for its meaty core, and [[Cereal/Legends|cereal]] for its flaky crust.<ref name="SWG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Crispics appeared in the [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''. It could be made by [[Merchant/Legends|traders]], a [[:w:c:swg:Profession|profession]] that specialized in the creation of various [[:w:c:swg:Item|goods]], including [[:w:c:swg:Food|food]]. [[:w:c:swg:Trader|Traders]] took the place of [[Chef/Legends|chefs]] and [[Artisan/Legends|artisans]], after those professions were removed from the game during the [[:w:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]] of [[November 15]], [[2005]].
